### GitHub
On GitHub, he maintains various repositories related to his technical work, particularly in the .NET and Azure ecosystems[3][4].
*   **Profile:** [rajkumar-rangaraj](https://github.com/rajkumar-rangaraj)[3]
*   **Key Contributions:** He is actively involved in the OpenTelemetry .NET project[5][1], contributing to features such as OTLP exporter diagnostics[6], addressing security advisories[7], and resolving bugs related to Azure Monitor exports[8].
*   **Projects:** Some of his public repositories include tools like `MAWSFileExplorer` (Azure Web Apps Disk Usage)[4], `PDB-Downloader`[9], and `API-Inspector`[10].

### Medium
On Medium, Rajkumar writes technical articles centered on observability, .NET telemetry, and Azure infrastructure[1][11][12].
*   **Profile:** [Rajkumar Rangaraj on Medium](https://medium.com/@rajkumar-rangaraj)[1]
